response:
TEMPERATURE IS THE MEASURE OF HOT OR COLD.
SOME SYSTEMS USE SENSORS TO SENSE STUFF.
SENSORS SEND SIGNALS TO SYSTEMS SOON.
SUNLIGHT SHINES STRONGLY ON SURFACES.
SEASONS SHIFT SLOWLY AS SUN MOVES.
STARS SHINE STEADILY IN SKY SPACES.
STORMS SWEEP STREETS WITH STRONG WINDS.
SNOW STICKS TO SURFACES IN COLD SEASONS.
SUMMER SUN SHINES SO SOFTLY ON SAND.
SILK SHIRTS SUIT SUMMER SEASONS SO WELL.
SUNSETS STUN US WITH SOFT SHADES.
ROLL IS THE WORD WE ROLL IN THIS LINE.
SO MANY SOUNDS SURROUND US IN SUMMER.
